ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mining_metrics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "block_time" REAL /* Time it takes to find a new block */,
  "block_reward" REAL /* Reward for finding a block */,
  "block_reward24" REAL /* Reward for finding a block in the last 24 hours */,
  "last_block" INTEGER /* Number of the last block */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Current difficulty of the network */,
  "difficulty24" REAL /* Difficulty of the network in the last 24 hours */,
  "nethash" REAL /* Network hash rate */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate of the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_rate24" REAL /* Exchange rate of the cryptocurrency in the last 24 hours */,
  "exchange_rate_vol" REAL /* Volume of the cryptocurrency exchanged */,
  "exchange_rate_curr" TEXT /* Currency used for exchange rate */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "estimated_rewards" REAL /* Estimated rewards for mining */,
  "estimated_rewards24" REAL /* Estimated rewards for mining in the last 24 hours */,
  "btc_revenue" REAL /* Revenue in BTC */,
  "btc_revenue24" REAL /* Revenue in BTC in the last 24 hours */,
  "profitability" REAL /* Profitability of mining */,
  "profitability24" REAL /* Profitability of mining in the last 24 hours */,
  "lagging" INTEGER /* Lagging indicator */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the metric entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mining site */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption of the mining operation */,
  "hardware_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the mining hardware */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the mining equipment */,
  "mining_pool" TEXT /* Mining pool used */,
  "miner_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the miner */,
  "profitability_threshold" TEXT /* Profitability threshold for alerts */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Alert status (e.g., triggered, not triggered) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., profitability, difficulty, exchange rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mining_metrics_miner_id FOREIGN KEY ("miner_id") REFERENCES miners ("miner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mining_metrics_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mining_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mining site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the mining site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the mining site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the mining site */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current usage of the site */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the site */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the site */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "miners" (
  "miner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each miner */,
  "miner_name" TEXT /* Name of the miner */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the miner */,
  "hardware_model" TEXT /* Model of the mining hardware */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the miner */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mining site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("miner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_miners_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric entry */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., profitability, difficulty, exchange rate) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES mining_metrics ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
